# Pull Request

## Summary

- What changed?
- Why is this change needed?

## Change Type

- [ ] Add a new benchmark entry
- [ ] Update metadata, links, or wording for an existing entry
- [ ] Reorganize sections or sorting
- [ ] Documentation or repository maintenance

## Classification Impact

- [ ] This PR changes classification, naming conventions, or section structure
- [ ] This PR only adds or corrects entries within the existing structure

If this PR changes taxonomy or section structure, link the related issue:

- Related issue:

## Benchmark Details

If this PR adds or updates benchmark entries, fill in the relevant items below.

- Section where the entry was added or updated:
- Primary reference:
- Public benchmark or project link:
- Key modalities, tasks, or evaluation scale:

## Checklist

- [ ] The benchmark or resource is publicly accessible
- [ ] The entry has a primary reference such as a paper, project page, or official repository
- [ ] The entry is placed in the most specific applicable section
- [ ] Table ordering remains correct: year descending, then same-year venue strength
- [ ] Markdown formatting renders cleanly
- [ ] I reviewed [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I opened or referenced an issue first for large taxonomy or naming changes

## Notes

- Anything reviewers should pay attention to
- Any edge cases, uncertainty, or follow-up work
